channel.title: Developer-Productivity on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Developer-Productivity on Junho Lee

item.title: Automating Repetitive Development Workflows with AI
item.description: Learn how to analyze development history, identify repetitive patterns, and package them into reusable scripts using Codex.

item.title: Designing Context to Make AI Your Co-worker
item.description: How to build a sustainable AI workflow by turning context into infrastructure and encoding your engineering preferences into configurations.
